hero.title: Precision Agriculture,
hero.desc: Krishi AI integrates real-time soil data, hyper-local weather, and market trends to ensure every acre is profitable and sustainable.
hero.cardSubtitle: Live values update from IoT sensors in production

stats.footer: Visionary goals for AgriAI's long-term roadmap — not current deployment metrics.

featureShowcase.title: Intelligence-Driven Farming
featureShowcase.f1Desc: Matches your farm's unique soil profile with real-time global weather data to recommend the most profitable crop.
featureShowcase.f2Desc: Utilizes historical price trends and seasonal data to tell you the perfect time to sell your harvest for maximum profit.
featureShowcase.f3Desc: Connects your farm to the closest distribution centers, calculating the lowest transport cost and shortest delivery routes.

workflow.title: The Intelligent Farm Journey
workflow.subtitle: From soil analysis to market sale — Krishi AI guides every step of your farming season.
workflow.step1Desc: Register with your phone number. Add your land area, location, and soil type to get started.
workflow.step2Desc: Enter your soil's N-P-K values and pH. Krishi AI calibrates every recommendation to your actual field conditions.
workflow.step3Desc: Our AI suggests the best crop for your soil, climate, and season — with a confidence score and expected yield.
workflow.step4Desc: Know exactly which fertilizer to use, how much, and whether to go chemical or organic — calculated for your field size.
workflow.step5Desc: Get a watering schedule based on your crop's needs, local weather, and soil moisture levels.
workflow.step6Desc: Upload a photo of your crop or leaf. AI detects diseases, pests, and nutrient deficiencies early — before they spread.
workflow.step7Desc: See today's mandi prices and AI forecasts for the next 24 hours. Know the best time to sell before you leave the farm.
workflow.step8Desc: Connect directly with buyers, FPOs, and mandis. Track your shipment and get paid — no middlemen.

analytics.title: Live Analytics & Forecasting
analytics.note: Charts below use simulated data for demonstration. In production, these connect live to Agmarknet mandi price APIs and farm sensor feeds.
analytics.chart1Sub: Simulated ₹/quintal values — live model trains on Agmarknet data
analytics.chart2Sub: Illustrative figures — live data integrates with farm yield records and market rates

speakSnapSow.title: Multilingual AI-Powered Guidance
speakSnapSow.desc: Leveraging advanced LLM chains, Whisper for speech-to-text, and ElevenLabs for natural synthesis, Krishi AI provides real-time, language-agnostic agronomic support.

climateSmart.title: Climate-Smart by Design
climateSmart.desc: Every recommendation generated by our AI is optimized for high yield while minimizing resource depletion and maximizing carbon sequestration credits.
climateSmart.note: Based on pilot simulations — not yet measured at scale

cta.title: Your farm. Smarter. Starting today.
cta.desc: Built for Indian farmers — AI-powered crop advice, fertilizer recommendations, and irrigation scheduling, all in one platform.
cta.note: Interested in deploying Krishi AI for your FPO, agri-cooperative, or state agriculture department? Leave your number — we'll call you.
cta.success: ✅ Got it! Our team will call you within 24 hours.
cta.errWrong: ❌ Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.desc: Sustainable farming, powered by AI — from seed to harvest.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Krishi AI • Built for a greener tomorrow 🌿

exploreFeatures.title: Platform Capabilities
exploreFeatures.f1Desc: AI-powered crop suggestions based on your soil, climate, and season.
exploreFeatures.f2Desc: LSTM-powered forecasting for maximum harvest ROI.
exploreFeatures.f3Desc: AI-optimized nutrient balancing for soil health.
exploreFeatures.f5Desc: Upload a leaf photo — AI detects diseases and pests instantly.
exploreFeatures.f8Desc: AI-generated sowing, irrigation, and harvest schedule for your entire season — with smart reminders.
exploreFeatures.f9Desc: Discover PM-KISAN, crop insurance, and state subsidies you're eligible for — matched to your farm profile.

cropPrediction.title: 🌾 AI Crop Prediction
cropPrediction.desc: Enter your soil nutrients and weather conditions. Our AI model will recommend the most suitable crop along with confidence score and fertilizer advice.

fertilizerPrediction.title: 🌱 AI Fertilizer Prediction
fertilizerPrediction.desc: Select your crop and current soil nutrients. Our AI model will tell you exactly what your soil needs, with both chemical and organic fertilizer options.
fertilizerPrediction.quantityQuestion: Want the exact quantity for your field?
fertilizerPrediction.alertArea: Please enter your land area in hectares.

irrigationAdvisor.title: Smart Irrigation Advisor
irrigationAdvisor.desc: Enter your latest field conditions and let AI recommend the most efficient irrigation strategy.
irrigationAdvisor.demoNote: Sample values are acceptable for demonstration purposes.
irrigationAdvisor.errBackend: Unable to connect to the AI service. Please ensure the Flask backend is running.

diseaseDetection.title: AI Crop Disease Detection
diseaseDetection.desc: Upload a crop leaf image and let Krishi AI identify diseases using deep learning in just a few seconds.
diseaseDetection.clickUpload: Click to upload a leaf image
diseaseDetection.dragDrop: Drag & drop is optional — click anywhere in this area.
diseaseDetection.alertUpload: Please upload a crop leaf image first.
diseaseDetection.diagnosisDesc: Generated using the uploaded crop leaf image.
diseaseDetection.recDesc: AI-powered disease classification based on the uploaded leaf image.

pricePrediction.title: Market Price Prediction
pricePrediction.desc: Predict tomorrow's crop prices using our LSTM-based forecasting model trained on historical mandi data. Get price trends, confidence score, and actionable selling recommendations.
pricePrediction.roadmapLine: 🚀 Currently live for Bhopal Mandi — expanding to every district, state, and village market across India.
pricePrediction.paramsDesc: Configure the crop details for AI price prediction.
pricePrediction.pilotMarket: 📍 Pilot Market: Bhopal Mandi, Madhya Pradesh
pricePrediction.pilotDesc: Our LSTM model is currently trained on Bhopal mandi historical data. This is our pilot deployment — the same model architecture will scale to fetch live Agmarknet data for every mandi across India as we expand.
pricePrediction.errBackend: Unable to connect to the backend. Please ensure the Flask server is running.
pricePrediction.movementDesc: Compared to the latest market price
pricePrediction.movementUp: The AI predicts an increase in tomorrow's mandi price. Farmers may consider waiting before selling.
pricePrediction.movementDown: The AI predicts a drop in price. Selling earlier could help maximize returns.
pricePrediction.roadmapSubtitle: From one mandi to every village market in India.

dashboard.weather_note: Live data connects to IMD weather API in production
dashboard.price_note: Illustrative ₹/quintal values — live model connects to Agmarknet mandi price API
